title: orelocator_compass
description: The ore compass locates and highlights nearby corresponding minerals.
body:
OreLocator Compass - Ore Locating Compass

Hold the Ore Locator Compass and the corresponding mineral to accurately locate vanilla ores within a 3x3 chunk area. It supports ore highlighting, durability enchanting, intelligent cooldown, and low memory usage.

Mod Basic Information

- Mod Name: OreLocator Compass

- Author: DY_XiaoJiaZi

- Version: 1.0.0

- Supported Game Version: Minecraft Forge 1.20.1

- Compatible Mods: Embeddium (Sodium), Oculus, etc.

Feature Introduction

- Ore Location: Hold the Ore Locator Compass in one hand and a mineral in the other, and the compass will automatically search for relevant nearby ores.

- Multiple Mineral Support: Compatible with all vanilla minerals, including ores, ingots, blocks, shards, etc.

- Ore Highlighting: The edges of located ore blocks will glow, with colors matching the ore's inherent hue.

- Durability System: 64 durability points, enchantable with Unbreaking and Mending.

- Intelligent Cooldown: Right-click to force a rescan with a 3-second cooldown.

- Low Memory Usage: Freezes current state when dropped or placed in an item frame to reduce memory consumption.

Usage Instructions

- Hold Mineral: Hold the Ore Locator Compass in one hand and any mineral (ore, ingot, block, etc.) in the other.

- Auto Search: The compass automatically searches for relevant ores within a 3x3 chunk area.

- Point to Target: The compass needle points to the nearest ore location.

- Force Refresh: Right-click to force a rescan (3-second cooldown).

- View Info: Hover over the compass to see the currently tracked mineral type and Y-coordinate.

Crafting Recipe (3x3 Crafting Table)

Redstone Block   Copper Block   Redstone Block
Diamond Block    Compass        Diamond Block
Redstone Block   Copper Block   Redstone Block

Supported Mineral Types

Ores

- Coal Ore and Deepslate Coal Ore

- Iron Ore and Deepslate Iron Ore

- Lapis Lazuli Ore and Deepslate Lapis Lazuli Ore

- Copper Ore and Deepslate Copper Ore

- Gold Ore and Deepslate Gold Ore

- Redstone Ore and Deepslate Redstone Ore

- Diamond Ore and Deepslate Diamond Ore

- Emerald Ore and Deepslate Emerald Ore

- Nether Quartz Ore

- Nether Gold Ore

- Ancient Debris

Ingots & Crystals

- Copper Ingot, Gold Ingot, Iron Ingot, Netherite Ingot

- Amethyst Shard, Diamond, Emerald, Lapis Lazuli, Nether Quartz, Redstone Dust

Blocks

- Amethyst Block, Copper Block, Diamond Block, Emerald Block, Gold Block, Iron Block

- Lapis Lazuli Block, Netherite Block, Quartz Block, Redstone Block

- Raw Copper Block, Raw Gold Block, Raw Iron Block

- Coal Block, Netherite Scrap

Installation Guide

1. Install Minecraft Forge 1.20.1.

2. Place the mod file into the .minecraft/mods folder.

3. Launch the game to use the mod.

Notes

- Ensure the correct version of Forge is installed.

- Compatible with mods like Embeddium (Sodium) and Oculus.

- Ore highlighting is visible within a 64-block range.

- The compass needle spins continuously when no ore is found.

Author Information

- Author: DY_XiaoJiaZi

- Mod Discussion: GitHub Issues

Changelog

- v1.0.0: Initial release, implementing the Ore Locator Compass functionality.
